name: C-10 --section risk-classification --risk-file emits the risk-classification data block per the architecture
command:
printf 'use_case: chatbot
classification: limited
source_framework: eu-ai-act
' > r.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section risk-classification --emit p.json --risk-file r.yaml --commit-sha abc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && grep -q 'eu-ai-act\|limited\|chatbot' p.json && echo bundled 1>&2
